files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+# Smoke Suite
+
+The smoke suite launches a real Ghost Pepper app bundle and validates a small set of deterministic operator journeys through macOS UI automation.
+
+## Run The Full Suite
+
+```bash
+./scripts/run-smoke-suite.sh
+```
+
+## List Available Cases
+
+```bash
+./scripts/run-smoke-suite.sh --list
+```
+
+## Run Specific Cases
+
+```bash
+./scripts/run-smoke-suite.sh settings debug-log quit
+```
+
+## What It Validates
+
+- first-run onboarding appears without an early microphone prompt or crash
+- the onboarding-only menu contains only `Show Setup Window` and `Quit`
+- `Settings...` opens from the real menu bar menu without crashing
+- `Debug Log...` opens from the real menu bar menu without crashing
+- `Quit` terminates the launched app
+
+## Isolation
+
+The runner builds Ghost Pepper with a smoke-only bundle identifier and launches each case with an isolated `HOME`. That keeps the suite out of the normal preferences and application-support directories while still exercising a real app bundle through LaunchServices.
+
+## What It Does Not Validate Yet
+
+- live model download completion
+- full onboarding completion
+- transcription or cleanup quality
+- OCR and paste-target behavior
+
+Those paths need additional fixtures or environment control before they count as trustworthy smoke validation.

@@ -0,0 +1,303 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+
+smoke_fail() {
+  printf 'FAIL: %s\n' "$*" >&2
+  return 1
+}
+
+smoke_note() {
+  printf '%s\n' "$*"
+}
+
+smoke_require_app_bundle() {
+  local app_path="$1"
+  local info_plist="$app_path/Contents/Info.plist"
+  local app_binary="$app_path/Contents/MacOS/GhostPepper"
+
+  if [[ ! -f "$info_plist" || ! -x "$app_binary" ]]; then
+    smoke_fail "$app_path is not a GhostPepper.app bundle"
+  fi
+}
+
+smoke_read_plist_value() {
+  local app_path="$1"
+  local key="$2"
+  /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Print :$key" "$app_path/Contents/Info.plist"
+}
+
+smoke_bundle_id() {
+  smoke_read_plist_value "$1" "CFBundleIdentifier"
+}
+
+smoke_display_name() {
+  smoke_read_plist_value "$1" "CFBundleDisplayName"
+}
+
+smoke_prepare_home() {
+  local smoke_home="$1"
+
+  mkdir -p \
+    "$smoke_home/Library/Application Support" \
+    "$smoke_home/Library/Caches" \
+    "$smoke_home/Library/Logs" \
+    "$smoke_home/Library/Preferences" \
+    "$smoke_home/tmp"
+}
+
+smoke_defaults() {
+  HOME="$SMOKE_HOME" defaults "$@"
+}
+
+smoke_reset_defaults_domain() {
+  smoke_defaults delete "$BUNDLE_ID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
+}
+
+smoke_write_bool_default() {
+  local key="$1"
+  local value="$2"
+
+  smoke_defaults write "$BUNDLE_ID" "$key" -bool "$value" >/dev/null
+}
+
+smoke_latest_crash_report() {
+  local real_home="${SMOKE_REAL_HOME:-$HOME}"
+  ls -1t "$real_home"/Library/Logs/DiagnosticReports/GhostPepper-*.ips 2>/dev/null | head -n 1 || true
+}
+
+smoke_app_binary_path() {
+  local app_path="${1:-$APP_PATH}"
+  local app_binary="$app_path/Contents/MacOS/GhostPepper"
+  local app_binary_dir
+
+  app_binary_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "$app_binary")" && pwd -P)"
+  printf '%s/%s\n' "$app_binary_dir" "$(basename "$app_binary")"
+}
+
+smoke_pgrep_app() {
+  pgrep -f "$(smoke_app_binary_path "$APP_PATH")" || true
+}
+
+smoke_launch_app() {
+  local before_pids current_pid
+  local -a extra_env=("$@")
+
+  before_pids="$(smoke_pgrep_app | tr '\n' ' ')"
+
+  if [[ "${#extra_env[@]}" -eq 0 ]]; then
+    open --env "HOME=$SMOKE_HOME" --env "TMPDIR=$SMOKE_HOME/tmp" -na "$APP_PATH"
+  else
+    open --env "HOME=$SMOKE_HOME" --env "TMPDIR=$SMOKE_HOME/tmp" "${extra_env[@]}" -na "$APP_PATH"
+  fi
+
+  for _ in $(seq 1 120); do
+    while IFS= read -r current_pid; do
+      if [[ -n "$current_pid" && " $before_pids " != *" $current_pid "* ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "$current_pid"
+        return 0
+      fi
+    done < <(smoke_pgrep_app)
+    sleep 0.25
+  done
+
+  smoke_fail "failed to capture GhostPepper pid for $APP_PATH"
+}
+
+smoke_kill_pid() {
+  local pid="${1:-}"
+
+  if [[ -z "$pid" ]]; then
+    return 0
+  fi
+
+  kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
+  wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
+}
+
+smoke_process_exists() {
+  local pid="$1"
+  kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1
+}
+
+smoke_wait_for_process_exit() {
+  local pid="$1"
+
+  for _ in $(seq 1 80); do
+    if ! smoke_process_exists "$pid"; then
+      return 0
+    fi
+    sleep 0.25
+  done
+
+  return 1
+}
+
+smoke_wait_for_status_item() {
+  local pid="$1"
+
+  osascript - "$pid" <<'APPLESCRIPT' >/dev/null
+on run argv
+  set pidNumber to (item 1 of argv) as integer
+
+  tell application "System Events"
+    repeat 40 times
+      try
+        tell first application process whose unix id is pidNumber
+          if (count of menu bar items of menu bar 2) > 0 then
+            return
+          end if
+        end tell
+      on error
+      end try
+      delay 0.25
+    end repeat
+  end tell
+
+  error "status item was not exposed in menu bar 2"
+end run
+APPLESCRIPT
+}
+
+smoke_menu_item_titles() {
+  local pid="$1"
+
+  osascript - "$pid" <<'APPLESCRIPT'
+on joinList(itemTitles, delimiter)
+  if (count of itemTitles) = 0 then
+    return ""
+  end if
+
+  set joinedText to item 1 of itemTitles
+  repeat with itemIndex from 2 to count of itemTitles
+    set joinedText to joinedText & delimiter & item itemIndex of itemTitles
+  end repeat
+
+  return joinedText
+end joinList
+
+on run argv
+  set pidNumber to (item 1 of argv) as integer
+
+  tell application "System Events"
+    tell first application process whose unix id is pidNumber
+      set frontmost to true
+      repeat 40 times
+        try
+          click menu bar item 1 of menu bar 2
+          set itemTitles to name of every menu item of menu 1 of menu bar item 1 of menu bar 2
+          return my joinList(itemTitles, linefeed)
+        on error
+          delay 0.25
+        end try
+      end repeat
+    end tell
+  end tell
+
+  error "menu item titles were not available"
+end run
+APPLESCRIPT
+}
+
+smoke_click_menu_item() {
+  local pid="$1"
+  local menu_title="$2"
+
+  osascript - "$pid" "$menu_title" <<'APPLESCRIPT' >/dev/null
+on run argv
+  set pidNumber to (item 1 of argv) as integer
+  set menuTitle to item 2 of argv
+
+  tell application "System Events"
+    tell first application process whose unix id is pidNumber
+      set frontmost to true
+      repeat 40 times
+        try
+          click menu bar item 1 of menu bar 2
+          click menu item menuTitle of menu 1 of menu bar item 1 of menu bar 2
+          return
+        on error
+          delay 0.25
+        end try
+      end repeat
+    end tell
+  end tell
+
+  error "menu item was not clickable"
+end run
+APPLESCRIPT
+}
+
+smoke_wait_for_window() {
+  local pid="$1"
+  local window_title="$2"
+
+  osascript - "$pid" "$window_title" <<'APPLESCRIPT' >/dev/null
+on run argv
+  set pidNumber to (item 1 of argv) as integer
+  set expectedWindowTitle to item 2 of argv
+
+  tell application "System Events"
+    tell first application process whose unix id is pidNumber
+      repeat 40 times
+        try
+          set windowNames to name of every window
+          if windowNames contains expectedWindowTitle then
+            return
+          end if
+        on error
+        end try
+        delay 0.25
+      end repeat
+    end tell
+  end tell
+
+  error "window did not appear"
+end run
+APPLESCRIPT
+}
+
+smoke_onboarding_window_state() {
+  local pid="$1"
+  local window_title="$2"
+
+  osascript - "$pid" "$window_title" <<'APPLESCRIPT' 2>/dev/null || printf 'automation-denied'
+on run argv
+  set pidNumber to (item 1 of argv) as integer
+  set expectedWindowTitle to item 2 of argv
+
+  tell application "System Events"
+    try
+      set targetProcess to first application process whose unix id is pidNumber
+    on error
+      return "missing-process"
+    end try
+
+    tell targetProcess
+      set onboardingWindows to windows whose name is expectedWindowTitle
+      if (count of onboardingWindows) = 0 then
+        return "no-window"
+      end if
+
+      tell item 1 of onboardingWindows
+        if (count of sheets) > 0 then
+          return "sheet-present"
+        end if
+      end tell
+
+      return "ready"
+    end tell
+  end tell
+end run
+APPLESCRIPT
+}
+
+smoke_microphone_tcc_events() {
+  local pid="$1"
+
+  /usr/bin/log show \
+    --style compact \
+    --last 30s \
+    --predicate "process == \"tccd\" AND (eventMessage CONTAINS \"pid=$pid\" OR eventMessage CONTAINS \"msgID=$pid.\")" \
+    2>/dev/null |
+    rg 'kTCCServiceMicrophone|service=kTCCServiceMicrophone|AUTHREQ_PROMPTING' ||
+    true
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,155 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
+REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
+
+SMOKE_BUNDLE_ID="com.github.matthartman.ghostpepper.smoke"
+CASES=(
+  onboarding-first-run
+  onboarding-menu
+  settings
+  debug-log
+  quit
+)
+SELECTED_CASES=()
+SELECTED_CASES_COUNT=0
+APP_PATH=""
+CREATED_ROOT=0
+KEEP_ARTIFACTS=0
+
+usage() {
+  cat <<EOF
+usage: $0 [--list] [--app /path/to/GhostPepper.app] [case...]
+
+cases:
+  onboarding-first-run
+  onboarding-menu
+  settings
+  debug-log
+  quit
+EOF
+}
+
+while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+  case "$1" in
+    --list)
+      printf '%s\n' "${CASES[@]}"
+      exit 0
+      ;;
+    --app)
+      APP_PATH="$2"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    -h|--help)
+      usage
+      exit 0
+      ;;
+    *)
+      SELECTED_CASES+=("$1")
+      SELECTED_CASES_COUNT=$((SELECTED_CASES_COUNT + 1))
+      shift
+      ;;
+  esac
+done
+
+contains_case() {
+  local candidate="$1"
+  local known_case
+  for known_case in "${CASES[@]}"; do
+    if [[ "$known_case" == "$candidate" ]]; then
+      return 0
+    fi
+  done
+  return 1
+}
+
+if [[ "$SELECTED_CASES_COUNT" -gt 0 ]]; then
+  for selected_case in "${SELECTED_CASES[@]}"; do
+    if ! contains_case "$selected_case"; then
+      echo "error: unknown smoke case '$selected_case'" >&2
+      usage >&2
+      exit 64
+    fi
+  done
+fi
+
+if [[ "$SELECTED_CASES_COUNT" -eq 0 ]]; then
+  SELECTED_CASES=("${CASES[@]}")
+fi
+
+if [[ -z "${GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_ROOT:-}" ]]; then
+  SMOKE_ROOT="$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ghostpepper-smoke-suite.XXXXXX")"
+  CREATED_ROOT=1
+else
+  SMOKE_ROOT="$GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_ROOT"
+fi
+
+cleanup() {
+  if [[ "$CREATED_ROOT" -eq 1 && "$KEEP_ARTIFACTS" -eq 0 ]]; then
+    rm -rf "$SMOKE_ROOT"
+  fi
+}
+
+trap cleanup EXIT
+
+mkdir -p "$SMOKE_ROOT"
+
+if [[ -z "$APP_PATH" ]]; then
+  DERIVED_DATA="$SMOKE_ROOT/derived-data"
+  echo "Building smoke app into $DERIVED_DATA"
+  xcodebuild \
+    -skipMacroValidation \
+    build \
+    -project "$REPO_ROOT/GhostPepper.xcodeproj" \
+    -scheme GhostPepper \
+    -destination 'platform=macOS' \
+    -derivedDataPath "$DERIVED_DATA" \
+    PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER="$SMOKE_BUNDLE_ID" \
+    CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
+    CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO
+  APP_PATH="$DERIVED_DATA/Build/Products/Debug/GhostPepper.app"
+fi
+
+if [[ ! -d "$APP_PATH" ]]; then
+  echo "error: app bundle not found at $APP_PATH" >&2
+  exit 66
+fi
+
+run_case() {
+  local case_name="$1"
+  local smoke_home="$SMOKE_ROOT/homes/$case_name"
+
+  rm -rf "$smoke_home"
+  mkdir -p "$smoke_home"
+
+  case "$case_name" in
+    onboarding-first-run)
+      GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME="$smoke_home" "$SCRIPT_DIR/smoke-first-run.sh" "$APP_PATH"
+      ;;
+    onboarding-menu)
+      GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME="$smoke_home" "$SCRIPT_DIR/smoke-onboarding-menu.sh" "$APP_PATH"
+      ;;
+    settings)
+      GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME="$smoke_home" "$SCRIPT_DIR/smoke-post-onboarding-menu.sh" "$APP_PATH" settings
+      ;;
+    debug-log)
+      GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME="$smoke_home" "$SCRIPT_DIR/smoke-post-onboarding-menu.sh" "$APP_PATH" debug-log
+      ;;
+    quit)
+      GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME="$smoke_home" "$SCRIPT_DIR/smoke-post-onboarding-menu.sh" "$APP_PATH" quit
+      ;;
+  esac
+}
+
+for case_name in "${SELECTED_CASES[@]}"; do
+  echo "==> $case_name"
+  if ! run_case "$case_name"; then
+    KEEP_ARTIFACTS=1
+    echo "Smoke suite failed in '$case_name'" >&2
+    echo "Artifacts preserved at: $SMOKE_ROOT" >&2
+    exit 1
+  fi
+done
+
+echo "Smoke suite passed (${#SELECTED_CASES[@]} case(s))"

@@ -0,0 +1,91 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
+# shellcheck source=lib/smoke-suite.sh
+source "$SCRIPT_DIR/lib/smoke-suite.sh"
+
+APP_PATH="${1:-${GHOST_PEPPER_APP_PATH:-}}"
+
+if [[ -z "$APP_PATH" ]]; then
+  echo "usage: $0 /path/to/GhostPepper.app" >&2
+  exit 64
+fi
+
+smoke_require_app_bundle "$APP_PATH"
+
+BUNDLE_ID="$(smoke_bundle_id "$APP_PATH")"
+WINDOW_TITLE="$(smoke_display_name "$APP_PATH")"
+SMOKE_REAL_HOME="${SMOKE_REAL_HOME:-$HOME}"
+CREATED_HOME=0
+APP_PID=""
+
+if [[ -n "${GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME:-}" ]]; then
+  SMOKE_HOME="$GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME"
+else
+  SMOKE_HOME="$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ghostpepper-smoke-home.XXXXXX")"
+  CREATED_HOME=1
+fi
+
+cleanup() {
+  smoke_kill_pid "$APP_PID"
+
+  if [[ "$CREATED_HOME" -eq 1 ]]; then
+    rm -rf "$SMOKE_HOME"
+  fi
+}
+
+trap cleanup EXIT
+
+smoke_prepare_home "$SMOKE_HOME"
+smoke_reset_defaults_domain
+smoke_write_bool_default onboardingCompleted false
+tccutil reset Microphone "$BUNDLE_ID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
+
+BEFORE_CRASH="$(smoke_latest_crash_report)"
+APP_PID="$(smoke_launch_app)"
+
+STATE="unknown"
+for _ in $(seq 1 40); do
+  STATE="$(smoke_onboarding_window_state "$APP_PID" "$WINDOW_TITLE")"
+  if [[ "$STATE" == "ready" || "$STATE" == "sheet-present" || "$STATE" == "automation-denied" ]]; then
+    break
+  fi
+  sleep 0.5
+done
+
+if [[ "$STATE" == "ready" ]]; then
+  for _ in $(seq 1 6); do
+    if ! smoke_process_exists "$APP_PID"; then
+      STATE="exited"
+      break
+    fi
+
+    STATE="$(smoke_onboarding_window_state "$APP_PID" "$WINDOW_TITLE")"
+    if [[ "$STATE" != "ready" ]]; then
+      break
+    fi
+
+    sleep 0.5
+  done
+fi
+
+if [[ "$STATE" == "ready" ]]; then
+  if [[ -n "$(smoke_microphone_tcc_events "$APP_PID")" ]]; then
+    STATE="microphone-tcc"
+  fi
+fi
+
+AFTER_CRASH="$(smoke_latest_crash_report)"
+if [[ "$AFTER_CRASH" != "$BEFORE_CRASH" ]]; then
+  STATE="crashed"
+fi
+
+if [[ "$STATE" != "ready" ]]; then
+  echo "FAIL: first-run onboarding state was '$STATE'" >&2
+  echo "bundle_id: $BUNDLE_ID" >&2
+  echo "smoke_home: $SMOKE_HOME" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "PASS: onboarding window appeared without an early microphone prompt or crash"

@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
+# shellcheck source=lib/smoke-suite.sh
+source "$SCRIPT_DIR/lib/smoke-suite.sh"
+
+APP_PATH="${1:-${GHOST_PEPPER_APP_PATH:-}}"
+
+if [[ -z "$APP_PATH" ]]; then
+  echo "usage: $0 /path/to/GhostPepper.app" >&2
+  exit 64
+fi
+
+smoke_require_app_bundle "$APP_PATH"
+
+BUNDLE_ID="$(smoke_bundle_id "$APP_PATH")"
+SMOKE_REAL_HOME="${SMOKE_REAL_HOME:-$HOME}"
+CREATED_HOME=0
+APP_PID=""
+
+if [[ -n "${GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME:-}" ]]; then
+  SMOKE_HOME="$GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME"
+else
+  SMOKE_HOME="$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ghostpepper-smoke-home.XXXXXX")"
+  CREATED_HOME=1
+fi
+
+cleanup() {
+  smoke_kill_pid "$APP_PID"
+
+  if [[ "$CREATED_HOME" -eq 1 ]]; then
+    rm -rf "$SMOKE_HOME"
+  fi
+}
+
+trap cleanup EXIT
+
+smoke_prepare_home "$SMOKE_HOME"
+smoke_reset_defaults_domain
+smoke_write_bool_default onboardingCompleted false
+
+APP_PID="$(smoke_launch_app)"
+smoke_wait_for_status_item "$APP_PID"
+
+EXPECTED_ITEMS=$'Show Setup Window\nQuit'
+ACTUAL_ITEMS="$(smoke_menu_item_titles "$APP_PID")"
+
+if [[ "$ACTUAL_ITEMS" != "$EXPECTED_ITEMS" ]]; then
+  echo "FAIL: onboarding menu items did not match the expected list" >&2
+  echo "expected:" >&2
+  printf '%s\n' "$EXPECTED_ITEMS" >&2
+  echo "actual:" >&2
+  printf '%s\n' "$ACTUAL_ITEMS" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "PASS: onboarding menu exposed only Show Setup Window and Quit"

@@ -0,0 +1,90 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
+# shellcheck source=lib/smoke-suite.sh
+source "$SCRIPT_DIR/lib/smoke-suite.sh"
+
+APP_PATH="${1:-${GHOST_PEPPER_APP_PATH:-}}"
+ACTION="${2:-}"
+
+if [[ -z "$APP_PATH" || -z "$ACTION" ]]; then
+  echo "usage: $0 /path/to/GhostPepper.app <settings|debug-log|quit>" >&2
+  exit 64
+fi
+
+smoke_require_app_bundle "$APP_PATH"
+
+BUNDLE_ID="$(smoke_bundle_id "$APP_PATH")"
+SMOKE_REAL_HOME="${SMOKE_REAL_HOME:-$HOME}"
+CREATED_HOME=0
+APP_PID=""
+
+if [[ -n "${GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME:-}" ]]; then
+  SMOKE_HOME="$GHOST_PEPPER_SMOKE_HOME"
+else
+  SMOKE_HOME="$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ghostpepper-smoke-home.XXXXXX")"
+  CREATED_HOME=1
+fi
+
+cleanup() {
+  smoke_kill_pid "$APP_PID"
+
+  if [[ "$CREATED_HOME" -eq 1 ]]; then
+    rm -rf "$SMOKE_HOME"
+  fi
+}
+
+trap cleanup EXIT
+
+smoke_prepare_home "$SMOKE_HOME"
+smoke_reset_defaults_domain
+smoke_write_bool_default onboardingCompleted true
+
+BEFORE_CRASH="$(smoke_latest_crash_report)"
+APP_PID="$(smoke_launch_app)"
+smoke_wait_for_status_item "$APP_PID"
+
+case "$ACTION" in
+  settings)
+    smoke_click_menu_item "$APP_PID" "Settings..."
+    smoke_wait_for_window "$APP_PID" "Ghost Pepper Settings"
+    smoke_process_exists "$APP_PID" || smoke_fail "GhostPepper exited after opening Settings"
+    ;;
+  debug-log)
+    smoke_click_menu_item "$APP_PID" "Debug Log..."
+    smoke_wait_for_window "$APP_PID" "Ghost Pepper Debug Log"
+    smoke_process_exists "$APP_PID" || smoke_fail "GhostPepper exited after opening Debug Log"
+    ;;
+  quit)
+    smoke_click_menu_item "$APP_PID" "Quit"
+    if ! smoke_wait_for_process_exit "$APP_PID"; then
+      smoke_fail "GhostPepper did not terminate after selecting Quit"
+    fi
+    APP_PID=""
+    ;;
+  *)
+    echo "usage: $0 /path/to/GhostPepper.app <settings|debug-log|quit>" >&2
+    exit 64
+    ;;
+esac
+
+AFTER_CRASH="$(smoke_latest_crash_report)"
+if [[ "$AFTER_CRASH" != "$BEFORE_CRASH" ]]; then
+  echo "FAIL: GhostPepper wrote a new crash report while validating '$ACTION'" >&2
+  echo "before: $BEFORE_CRASH" >&2
+  echo "after: $AFTER_CRASH" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+case "$ACTION" in
+  settings)
+    echo "PASS: Settings opened from the menu bar without crashing"
+    ;;
+  debug-log)
+    echo "PASS: Debug Log opened from the menu bar without crashing"
+    ;;
+  quit)
+    echo "PASS: Quit terminated the smoke app cleanly"
+    ;;
+esac
